Account.Name: Bangor Savings Checking
Account.Description: Side-job checking at Bangor Savings Bank. Stripe payouts and customer checks land here.

Account.Name: Service Call Income
Account.Description: Labor on residential and small commercial service calls.

Account.Name: Materials Sales
Account.Description: Wire, breakers, and devices billed through to customers at cost plus markup.

Account.Name: Materials & Supplies
Account.Description: Wire, cable, breakers, devices, fittings from supply houses.

Account.Name: Tools & Small Equipment
Account.Description: Hand tools, bits, blades, meters, consumables.

Account.Name: Vehicle - Fuel & Mileage
Account.Description: F-150 fuel and tracked business mileage for side-job runs.

Account.Name: Self-Employment Tax
Account.Description: Quarterly federal and Maine estimated tax set aside on side-job income.

Account.Name: Liability Insurance
Account.Description: General liability coverage for side work.

Account.Name: Licenses & Permits
Account.Description: Maine electrician license renewal and job permits.

Account.Name: Tax Set-Aside Savings
Account.Description: Bangor Savings sub-account holding back roughly 25 percent of side-job income for taxes.
